title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Netsol Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Netsol Technologies:
Netsol Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies!
